message:
fix(guard): close TOCTOU symlink race in reservation scanner

The embedded Python guard code checked is_file(follow_symlinks=False) but
then opened the path with open() which follows symlinks. An attacker could
race the check with a symlink swap to read arbitrary files. Add an explicit
is_symlink() check immediately before open() to close the window.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -683,6 +683,8 @@ def get_active_reservations():
             continue
         if not entry.name.endswith(".json"):
             continue
+        if entry.is_symlink():
+            continue
         try:
             with open(entry.path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
                 record = json.load(handle)
